title: Adobe’s Project Indigo can now critique your photos, and quietly rebuild them
summary: He built the computational photography behind Google’s Pixel cameras before joining Adobe, as TechCrunch notes. Adobe built a small model to boost them back, guided by your original photo. “Welcome to the ‘what is a photo’ debate, Adobe,” The Verge wrote.
